channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump team faces bar referrals from Obama-appointed judge
Trump declares Iran blockade reinstated, claims US controls Hormuz
Europe funds Putin's war machine as NATO boosts defenses
item.description: A new analysis of commercial shipping data reveals European nations spent billions in early 2026 on Arctic liquefied natural gas purchases, indirectly supporting Russia's war efforts.

item.title: Bruce Pearl urges Congress to honor Graham through bipartisanship
item.description: Congress should honor the late Senator Lindsey Graham by adopting the bipartisan approach that characterized his work for South Carolina, according to Bruce Pearl.
